bindings.quest_action: retrieve the rare materials from hostile territory
bindings.quest_focus: a source of rare materials deep in dangerous land
bindings.quest_stakes: a masterwork that hasn't been crafted in a generation
bindings.quest_threat: the creatures occupying the area around the deposit

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you couldn't have arrived at a better time. I've been searching for someone resourceful enough to help me.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've tracked down {quest_focus} {location_hint}: {quest_item} I've been trying to get my hands on for months. The problem is {quest_threat}: no merchant will make the trip and I can't leave the forge unattended. If I had enough, I could craft {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.outro: You'd be doing more than running an errand. You'd be making {quest_reward_hint} possible.

playerResponses.text: Tell me where to look. I'll bring back everything I can carry.
Rare materials in dangerous territory? I'll need proper compensation.
I'm not a supply runner. Find another way.

bindings.quest_action: harvest the key ingredient from its only growing site
bindings.quest_focus: the one place where the ingredient grows
bindings.quest_stakes: a recipe that could feed the settlement through the harshest winter
bindings.quest_threat: the creatures that control the territory where it grows
bindings.quest_reward_hint: enough food to last the whole settlement through winter

dialogueChunks.intro: Ah, a traveler with capable hands! {player_name}, I've been hoping someone like you would pass through.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've been perfecting {quest_stakes} for years. But the key ingredient, {quest_item}, only grows at {quest_focus}, and that place is crawling with {enemy_type}. {target_npc} saw it flourishing {location_hint} but couldn't get close enough. I need someone who can {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring me what I need and I'll make sure {quest_reward_hint} becomes reality. You included.

playerResponses.text: A worthy cause. I'll get your ingredients.
I'll do it, but I want the first serving of whatever you cook.
I'm no forager. You'll have to find someone else.

bindings.quest_action: claim the abandoned cache before someone else does
bindings.quest_focus: a collapsed storehouse with unclaimed goods
bindings.quest_stakes: the commission that will establish my reputation
bindings.quest_threat: the creatures that moved in when the owners fled
bindings.quest_origin: owners who fled and never came back

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need to speak with you urgently. I've discovered something that won't wait.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A merchant mentioned {quest_focus} {location_hint}: {quest_item} abandoned when the {enemy_type} moved in. {quest_origin}. That cache is exactly what I need to finish {quest_stakes} that {target_npc} placed with me. But the road is anything but safe.
dialogueChunks.outro: First come, first served: if we don't {quest_action}, someone else will. Or {quest_threat} will destroy it.

playerResponses.text: An unclaimed cache? I'll have it back before anyone else catches wind.
Salvage from dangerous territory doesn't come cheap. What's my share?
Abandoned for a reason, I'd wager. Count me out.

bindings.quest_action: make the trade run through hostile territory and back
bindings.quest_stakes: supplies the settlement hasn't had in months
bindings.quest_threat: the hostile creatures infesting the direct route

dialogueChunks.intro: Over here, {player_name}! I've been flagging down every capable-looking soul all week. You're the first one who stopped.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Word reached me that {target_npc} in a distant settlement has {quest_item} in surplus: exactly what I've been short on. They're willing to trade, but someone has to {quest_action}. {quest_focus} goes {location_hint}, straight through {enemy_type} territory. I'd go myself but I'd be dead before I got halfway.
dialogueChunks.outro: Make the exchange and bring back the goods, and I'll make sure {quest_reward_hint} is worth your while.

playerResponses.text: A trade run through hostile territory? I've handled worse.
That's a dangerous road. I expect danger pay on top of whatever you're offering.
Hire a caravan with guards. I work alone.
